input.description: Extract information from Stack Overflow page and save screenshot
input.prompt: Navigate to https://stackoverflow.com/questions/11227809/why-is-processing-a-sorted-array-faster-than-processing-an-unsorted-array. Extract: (1) the total vote count on the accepted answer, (2) the username of the accepted answer's author, (3) the number of distinct code blocks (pre/code elements) in the accepted answer, and (4) the total number of answers the question currently has (as shown in the answers header count). Save a screenshot of the accepted answer to eval-so-audit.png. Return the final answer in exactly four labeled lines: AcceptedAnswerVotes:, AcceptedAnswerAuthor:, CodeBlockCount:, TotalAnswers:.
